documentation_articles.title: BACnet Integration Guide for Building Automation Dashboards
documentation_articles.summary: Step-by-step instructions for connecting BACnet-compatible HVAC and lighting controllers to the building automation dashboard.
documentation_articles.content:
This guide walks through configuring BACnet/IP devices with the building automation dashboard. It covers network topology, device discovery, BBMD configuration, and common object mappings (Analog Input, Analog Output, Binary Input, and Multi-state objects). You will learn how to:

1. Verify BACnet/IP network settings and UDP ports.
2. Add a new BACnet integration in the dashboard.
3. Discover BACnet devices and import points.
4. Map BACnet objects to dashboard data streams.
5. Troubleshoot communication issues using BACnet captures and logs.

documentation_articles.title: Configuring Modbus Integration with Energy Meters
documentation_articles.summary: Learn how to connect Modbus RTU/TCP energy meters to the platform for real-time consumption and demand monitoring.
documentation_articles.content:
This article explains how to integrate Modbus-compatible energy meters with the energy management module. Topics covered include:

- Modbus RTU vs. Modbus TCP basics
- Wiring RS-485 networks and termination
- Adding a Modbus integration in the admin portal
- Importing device-specific register maps
- Scaling raw register values into engineering units (kWh, kW, Volts, Amps)
- Testing register reads and handling timeouts or CRC errors.

documentation_articles.title: BACnet Point Mapping Reference
documentation_articles.summary: Reference tables for mapping BACnet objects to logical points in the automation system.
documentation_articles.content: Use this reference when mapping BACnet objects into logical points. It includes recommended naming conventions, engineering units, and alarm thresholds for common HVAC and lighting objects.

documentation_articles.title: Modbus Communication Troubleshooting Checklist
documentation_articles.summary: A practical checklist for resolving common Modbus RTU and TCP communication errors.
documentation_articles.content: If your Modbus integration is not returning data, follow this checklist: verify wiring and termination, confirm slave IDs, check baud rate and parity, test with a protocol analyzer, and validate register addresses.

documentation_articles.title: Getting Started with the Building Automation Dashboard
documentation_articles.summary: Overview of key concepts and first steps to bring your building automation dashboard online.
documentation_articles.content: This article introduces projects, sites, floors, and device groups in the building automation dashboard. It also explains how to invite team members, schedule a live demo, and connect your first controller.

documentation_articles.title: API Overview: REST Endpoints and Webhooks
documentation_articles.summary: High-level overview of the public REST API and outbound webhook capabilities.
documentation_articles.content: The REST API exposes resources for devices, events, alarms, and occupancy. Webhooks can be configured to send real-time notifications to your IT systems when alarms or visitor events occur.

documentation_articles.title: Home Security Package Configurator User Guide
documentation_articles.summary: Instructions for building custom home security packages using the online configurator.
documentation_articles.content: Learn how to select your property type, add door/window sensors, smart locks, and optional extras, and keep your total under a target budget using the live summary panel.

documentation_articles.title: Selecting the Right 16-Channel NVR
documentation_articles.summary: Comparison of 16-channel NVR models by resolution, storage, and budget.
documentation_articles.content: This guide compares our 16-channel NVR lineup, including 1080p and 4K models. It highlights key decision factors: maximum bitrate, PoE support, storage bays, and budget constraints under $900.

documentation_articles.title: Visitor Management Kiosk Setup
documentation_articles.summary: How to deploy your first visitor management kiosk and start a trial.
documentation_articles.content: Follow these steps to activate your kiosk license, configure ID scanning, set expected visitor volume, and invite reception staff to the portal.

documentation_articles.title: Integrating Card Readers with Office Access Control
documentation_articles.summary: Guidelines for wiring and provisioning card readers on office doors.
documentation_articles.content: This article covers door controller wiring, Wiegand vs. OSDP reader options, and how to map cardholder access levels to specific office doors through the portal.

documentation_articles.title: Energy-Saving Automation Rule Examples
documentation_articles.summary: Sample automation rules using smart thermostats and lighting to reduce energy costs.
documentation_articles.content: Examples include occupancy-based setback schedules, after-hours lighting shutoff, and demand-response pre-cooling for office buildings.

documentation_articles.title: Troubleshooting BACnet Device Discovery Issues
documentation_articles.summary: How to diagnose and resolve BACnet device discovery problems.
documentation_articles.content: Learn how to confirm BBMD configuration, IP subnets, and device instance number conflicts that can prevent successful BACnet discovery.

documentation_articles.title: API Authentication and Access Tokens
documentation_articles.summary: Details on authenticating to the API using OAuth2 access tokens.
documentation_articles.content: This document describes how to obtain access tokens, refresh them, and securely store credentials for server-to-server integrations.

documentation_articles.title: Indoor Camera Installation Best Practices
documentation_articles.summary: Placement and configuration tips for indoor security cameras.
documentation_articles.content: Learn optimal mounting heights, field-of-view considerations, and privacy guidelines for indoor offices and apartments.

documentation_articles.title: Maintenance Plans Overview
documentation_articles.summary: Overview of residential and commercial maintenance plan tiers and billing options.
documentation_articles.content: Compare plan levels, building size recommendations, and billing frequencies (monthly vs. annual) to find the right support coverage.

documentation_articles.title: Visitor Management ID Scanning Requirements
documentation_articles.summary: Hardware and licensing requirements for enabling ID scanning on visitor kiosks.
documentation_articles.content: This article lists compatible ID scanners, camera specifications, and plan levels required to enable ID document scanning on kiosks.
